Home › Brevard County › Palm Bay › Vegetarian Restaurants

Vegetarian Restaurants in Palm Bay

Most of the restaurants with vegetarian options in Palm Bay grade well: 4 of 6 hold an A, led by BEEF O'BRADY'S at 99/100. Every listing below carries its latest Florida health grade.

6 vegetarian restaurants

  • A 99 B
    BEEF O'BRADY'S American ★ 3.9 (1166) Palm Bay · Brevard County VegDF +2 more Inspected Apr 2026
  • A 97 C
    COPPER CHIMNEY GRILL & BAR Other ★ 4.3 (1012) Palm Bay · Brevard County VegGF +4 more Inspected Dec 2025
  • A 97 T
    TACO BELL 1323300 Mexican ★ 3.4 (1596) Palm Bay · Brevard County Veg Inspected Mar 2026
  • A 96 B
    BROKEN BARREL TAVERN Other ★ 4.4 (1319) Palm Bay · Brevard County VegGF +3 more Inspected Dec 2025
  • B 82 C
    CARRABBA'S ITALIAN GRILL Italian ★ 4.3 (3231) Palm Bay · Brevard County VegGF +1 more Inspected Jun 2026
  • F 55 L
    LAZY TURTLE RIVERFRONT Other ★ 4.2 (1841) Palm Bay · Brevard County VegGF +5 more Inspected Jun 2026
